subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-19 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In every affair one undertakes, one must arise to pursue it with great effort, acting in a way commensurate… How many are the impossible things which occupy the minds of certain people
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان باید در هر امری بجد و جهد برخیزد تا بشرائط آن عامل گردد و بسر حد کمال رسد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @excellence; distinction, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @effort; striving
